use_cases: Chat interface input for AI assistants and chatbots
Text input field with submit functionality for conversational AI applications
Prompt input for generative AI tools and content creation platforms
ai_summary: A minimalist AI chat input component built with Radix UI and class-variance-authority, featuring standard button variants and Lucide icons for submit and attachment actions. Designed for conversational AI interfaces, providing a clean input field suitable for SaaS platforms, developer tools, and AI-powered applications. Uses Tailwind CSS for styling with standard focus-visible ring and hover state behaviors.
